title: linum australe var. glandulosum
intro: Linum australe var. glandulosum, also known as the glandular blue flax, is a plant species in the family Linaceae. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and sore eyes. The health benefits of Linum australe var. glandulosum include soothing and calming effects on the skin, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, salves, and tinctures, which can be used externally to treat various skin issues and internally to promote overall well-being.
